name: ai-sdk-usechat-hook
description: AIChatDemoPage uses @ai-sdk/react useChat hook with streamProtocol: 'text'. Hook provides: messages, input, setInput, handleSubmit, isLoading, setMessages. Messages are persisted to chatDomain via onFinish callback. Version 1.2.12 supports message.parts for tool call display.
relevantCode: const { messages, input, setInput, handleSubmit, isLoading } = useChat({ api: '/api/chat', streamProtocol: 'text' })
recommendation: Unified page can use useChat for AI SDK streaming or useAgentChat for MCP agent.chat. useChat supports message.parts for tool calls.
